metadata.significance: Swears by different types of winds, stories of Abraham and Lot

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلذَّٰرِيَـٰتِ ذَرْوًا
ayahs.transliteration: Waalththariyati tharwan

translations.en_sahih: By those [winds] scattering [dust] dispersing
translations.en_yusufali: By the (Winds) that scatter broadcast;
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi angin yang menerbang dan menaburkan (debu, biji-bijian benih, dan lain-lainnya), dengan penerbangan dan penaburan yang sesungguh-sungguhnya, -

ayahs.arabic: فَٱلْحَـٰمِلَـٰتِ وِقْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Faalhamilati wiqran

translations.en_sahih: And those [clouds] carrying a load [of water]
translations.en_yusufali: And those that lift and bear away heavy weights;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan awan yang membawa dan mengangkut muatannya (ke tempat yang dikehendaki), -

ayahs.arabic: فَٱلْجَـٰرِيَـٰتِ يُسْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Faaljariyati yusran

translations.en_sahih: And those [ships] sailing with ease
translations.en_yusufali: And those that flow with ease and gentleness;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kapal-kapal yang belayar laju dengan kemudahan yang diberikan kepadanya, -

ayahs.arabic: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَـٰتِ أَمْرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Faalmuqassimati amran

translations.en_sahih: And those [angels] apportioning [each] matter,
translations.en_yusufali: And those that distribute and apportion by Command;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan malaikat-malaikat yang membahagi-bahagikan segala perkara yang mereka ditugaskan membahagikannya;

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Innama tooAAadoona lasadiqun

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, what you are promised is true.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily that which ye are promised is true;
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sumpah demi sumpah) bahawa sesungguhnya segala yang dijanjikan kepada kamu (mengenai hari akhirat) tetap benar;

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainna alddeena lawaqiAAun

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, the recompense is to occur.
translations.en_yusufali: And verily Judgment and Justice must indeed come to pass.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bahawa sesungguhnya balasan amal, tetap berlaku.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waalssamai thati alhubuki

translations.en_sahih: By the heaven containing pathways,
translations.en_yusufali: By the Sky with (its) numerous Paths,
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi langit yang mempunyai jalan-jalan yang berbagai bentuk keadaannya,

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Innakum lafee qawlin mukhtalifin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, you are in differing speech.
translations.en_yusufali: Truly ye are in a doctrine discordant,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya kamu berada dalam keadaan berlainan pendapat (mengenai ugama yang dibawa oleh Nabi Muhammad, s.a.w).

ayahs.arabic: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yufaku AAanhu man ofika

translations.en_sahih: Deluded away from the Qur'an is he who is deluded.
translations.en_yusufali: Through which are deluded (away from the Truth) such as would be deluded.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dipalingkan daripada (perselisihan) itu orang-orang yang telah dipalingkan Allah (dengan sebab keikhlasannya mencari kebenaran).

ayahs.arabic: قُتِلَ ٱلْخَرَّٰصُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qutila alkharrasoona

translations.en_sahih: Destroyed are the falsifiers
translations.en_yusufali: Woe to the falsehood-mongers,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Binasalah orang-orang yang sentiasa mengeluarkan pendapat dengan cara agak-agak sahaja,

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatheena hum fee ghamratin sahoona

translations.en_sahih: Who are within a flood [of confusion] and heedless.
translations.en_yusufali: Those who (flounder) heedless in a flood of confusion:
translations.ms_basmeih: (Iaitu) orang-orang yang tenggelam alam kejahilan, serta lalaikan (hari pembalasan).

ayahs.arabic: يَسْـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Yasaloona ayyana yawmu alddeeni

translations.en_sahih: They ask, "When is the Day of Recompense?"
translations.en_yusufali: They ask, "When will be the Day of Judgment and Justice?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka bertanya (secara mengejek): "Bilakah datangnya hari pembalasan itu?"

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma hum AAala alnnari yuftanoona

translations.en_sahih: [It is] the Day they will be tormented over the Fire
translations.en_yusufali: (It will be) a Day when they will be tried (and tested) over the Fire!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Jawabnya: hari itu ialah) hari mereka diseksa (dengan dibakar) atas api neraka, -

ayahs.arabic: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Thooqoo fitnatakum hatha allathee kuntum bihi tastaAAjiloona

translations.en_sahih: [And will be told], "Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient."
translations.en_yusufali: "Taste ye your trial! This is what ye used to ask to be hastened!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sambil dikatakan kepada mereka): "Rasalah azab seksa yang disediakan untuk kamu; inilah dia yang dahulu kamu minta disegerakan kedatangannya".

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna almuttaqeena fee jannatin waAAuyoonin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs,
translations.en_yusufali: As to the Righteous, they will be in the midst of Gardens and Springs,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertaqwa adalah ditempatkan di dalam beberapa taman Syurga, dengan matair-matair terpancar padanya.

ayahs.arabic: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Akhitheena ma atahum rabbuhum innahum kanoo qabla thalika muhsineena

translations.en_sahih: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good.
translations.en_yusufali: Taking joy in the things which their Lord gives them, because, before then, they lived a good life.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Keadaan mereka di sana) sentiasa menerima nikmat dan rahmat yang diberikan kepadanya oleh Tuhan mereka. Sesungguhnya mereka di dunia dahulu adalah orang-orang yang berbuat kebaikan.

ayahs.arabic: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kanoo qaleelan mina allayli ma yahjaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: They used to sleep but little of the night,
translations.en_yusufali: They were in the habit of sleeping but little by night,
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka sentiasa mengambil sedikit sahaja: masa dari waktu malam, untuk mereka tidur.

ayahs.arabic: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wabialashari hum yastaghfiroona

translations.en_sahih: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness,
translations.en_yusufali: And in the hour of early dawn, they (were found) praying for Forgiveness;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan pada waktu akhir malam (sebelum fajar) pula, mereka selalu beristighfar kepada Allah (memohon ampun).

ayahs.arabic: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wafee amwalihim haqqun lilssaili waalmahroomi

translations.en_sahih: And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived.
translations.en_yusufali: And in their wealth and possessions (was remembered) the right of the (needy,) him who asked, and him who (for some reason) was prevented (from asking).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan pada harta-harta mereka, (ada pula bahagian yang mereka tentukan menjadi) hak untuk orang miskin yang meminta dan orang miskin yang menahan diri (daripada meminta).

ayahs.arabic: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَـٰتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wafee alardi ayatun lilmooqineena

translations.en_sahih: And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]
translations.en_yusufali: On the earth are signs for those of assured Faith,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan pada bumi ada tanda-tanda (yang membuktikan keesaan dan kekuasaan Allah) bagi orang-orang (yang mahu mencapai pengetahuan) yang yakin,

ayahs.arabic: وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wafee anfusikum afala tubsiroona

translations.en_sahih: And in yourselves. Then will you not see?
translations.en_yusufali: As also in your own selves: Will ye not then see?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga pada diri kamu sendiri. Maka mengapa kamu tidak mahu melihat serta memikirkan (dalil-dalil dan bukti itu)?

ayahs.arabic: وَفِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wafee alssamai rizqukum wama tooAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised.
translations.en_yusufali: And in heaven is your Sustenance, as (also) that which ye are promised.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan di langit pula terdapat (sebab-sebab) rezeki kamu, dan juga terdapat apa yang telah (ditakdirkan dan) dijanjikan kepada kamu.

ayahs.arabic: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fawarabbi alssamai waalardi innahu lahaqqun mithla ma annakum tantiqoona

translations.en_sahih: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as [sure as] it is that you are speaking.
translations.en_yusufali: Then, by the Lord of heaven and earth, this is the very Truth, as much as the fact that ye can speak intelligently to each other.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka demi Tuhan langit dan bumi, sesungguhnya (apa yang tersebut) itu tetap benar, (tidak patut diragu-ragukan) sebagaimana (tidak sepatutnya diragukan) benarnya kamu dapat berkata-kata.

ayahs.arabic: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Hal ataka hadeethu dayfi ibraheema almukrameena

translations.en_sahih: Has there reached you the story of the honored guests of Abraham? -
translations.en_yusufali: Has the story reached thee, of the honoured guests of Abraham?
translations.ms_basmeih: Sudahkah sampai kepadamu (wahai Muhammad) perihal tetamu Nabi Ibrahim yang dimuliakan?

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا ۖ قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ith dakhaloo AAalayhi faqaloo salaman qala salamun qawmun munkaroona

translations.en_sahih: When they entered upon him and said, "[We greet you with] peace." He answered, "[And upon you] peace, [you are] a people unknown.
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, they entered his presence, and said: "Peace!" He said, "Peace!" (and thought, "These seem) unusual people."
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika mereka masuk mendapatkannya lalu memberi salam dengan berkata: "Salam sejahtera kepadamu!" Ia menjawab: Salam sejahtera kepada kamu! "(Sambil berkata dalam hati): mereka ini orang-orang yang tidak dikenal.

ayahs.arabic: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Faragha ila ahlihi fajaa biAAijlin sameenin

translations.en_sahih: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf
translations.en_yusufali: Then he turned quickly to his household, brought out a fatted calf,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian ia masuk mendapatkan Ahli rumahnya serta dibawanya keluar seekor anak lembu gemuk (yang dipanggang).

ayahs.arabic: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faqarrabahu ilayhim qala ala takuloona

translations.en_sahih: And placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat?"
translations.en_yusufali: And placed it before them.. he said, "Will ye not eat?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu dihidangkannya kepada mereka sambil berkata: "Silalah makan".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Faawjasa minhum kheefatan qaloo la takhaf wabashsharoohu bighulamin AAaleemin

translations.en_sahih: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy.
translations.en_yusufali: (When they did not eat), He conceived a fear of them. They said, "Fear not," and they gave him glad tidings of a son endowed with knowledge.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah dilihatnya mereka mereka tidak menjamah makanan itu), maka ia merasa takut dari keadaan mereka. (Melihat kecemasannya), mereka berkata: "Janganlah engkau takut (wahai Ibrahim)". Lalu mereka memberikan berita gembira kepadanya, bahawa ia akan beroleh seorang anak yang berpengetahuan.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَقْبَلَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ فِى صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Faaqbalati imraatuhu fee sarratin fasakkat wajhaha waqalat AAajoozun AAaqeemun

translations.en_sahih: And his wife approached with a cry [of alarm] and struck her face and said, "[I am] a barren old woman!"
translations.en_yusufali: But his wife came forward (laughing) aloud: she smote her forehead and said: "A barren old woman!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mendengarkan berita yang mengembirakan itu), maka datanglah isterinya sambil menjerit (kehairanan) lalu menepuk mukanya sambil berkata: "Aku sudah tua, lagi mandul, (bagaimana aku boleh mendapat anak)?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo kathaliki qala rabbuki innahu huwa alhakeemu alAAaleemu

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing."
translations.en_yusufali: They said, "Even so has thy Lord spoken: and He is full of Wisdom and Knowledge."
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka berkata: "Demikianlah Tuhanmu berfirman, (kami hanya menyampaikan sahaja); Sesungguhnya Dia lah Yang Maha Bijaksana, lagi Maha Mengetahui".

ayahs.arabic: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qala fama khatbukum ayyuha almursaloona

translations.en_sahih: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"
translations.en_yusufali: (Abraham) said: "And what, O ye Messengers, is your errand (now)?"
translations.ms_basmeih: Nabi Ibrahim bertanya: "(Selain dari itu) apa lagi tugas penting kamu wahai utusan Tuhan?"

ayahs.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Qaloo inna orsilna ila qawmin mujrimeena

translations.en_sahih: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals
translations.en_yusufali: They said, "We have been sent to a people (deep) in sin;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka menjawab: "Sesungguhnya Kami diutus kepada suatu kaum yang berdosa (untuk membinasakan mereka);

ayahs.arabic: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Linursila AAalayhim hijaratan min teenin

translations.en_sahih: To send down upon them stones of clay,
translations.en_yusufali: "To bring on, on them, (a shower of) stones of clay (brimstone),
translations.ms_basmeih: "Supaya Kami menimpakan mereka dengan batu-batu dari tanah (yang dibakar),

ayahs.arabic: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Musawwamatan AAinda rabbika lilmusrifeena

translations.en_sahih: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors."
translations.en_yusufali: "Marked as from thy Lord for those who trespass beyond bounds."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Batu-batu itu ditandakan di sisi Tuhanmu, untuk membinasakan orang-orang yang melampaui batas (dalam keingkarannya)".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faakhrajna man kana feeha mina almumineena

translations.en_sahih: So We brought out whoever was in the cities of the believers.
translations.en_yusufali: Then We evacuated those of the Believers who were there,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah sampai utusan Kami ke tempat itu), Kami (perintahkan mereka) mengeluarkan orang-orang yang beriman yang tinggal di situ.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fama wajadna feeha ghayra baytin mina almuslimeena

translations.en_sahih: And We found not within them other than a [single] house of Muslims.
translations.en_yusufali: But We found not there any just (Muslim) persons except in one house:
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sesudah dipereksa) maka (utusan) Kami tidak mendapati di situ melainkan sebuah rumah sahaja yang ada penduduknya dari orang-orang Islam (yang beriman kepada Nabi Lut).

ayahs.arabic: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
ayahs.transliteration: Watarakna feeha ayatan lillatheena yakhafoona alAAathaba alaleema

translations.en_sahih: And We left therein a sign for those who fear the painful punishment.
translations.en_yusufali: And We left there a Sign for such as fear the Grievous Penalty.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami tinggalkan di negeri itu (timbunan batu-batu yang telah menghujani dan membinasakan mereka), sebagai tanda (yang mendatangkan keinsafan) bagi orang-orang yang sedia takut kepada azab seksa yang tidak terperi sakitnya.

ayahs.arabic: وَفِى مُوسَىٰٓ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wafee moosa ith arsalnahu ila firAAawna bisultanin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: And in Moses [was a sign], when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority.
translations.en_yusufali: And in Moses (was another Sign): Behold, We sent him to Pharaoh, with authority manifest.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga pada (kisah) Nabi Musa (terdapat dalil-dalil yang memberi keinsafan), - ketika kami mengutusnya kepada Firaun dengan membawa mukjizat yang nyata.

ayahs.arabic: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَـٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Fatawalla biruknihi waqala sahirun aw majnoonun

translations.en_sahih: But he turned away with his supporters and said," A magician or a madman."
translations.en_yusufali: But (Pharaoh) turned back with his Chiefs, and said, "A sorcerer, or one possessed!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Firaun berpaling ingkar dengan berdasarkan kekuasaannya sambil berkata: "(Musa itu) adalah seorang ahli sihir, atau seorang gila!"

ayahs.arabic: فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Faakhathnahu wajunoodahu fanabathnahum fee alyammi wahuwa muleemun

translations.en_sahih: So We took him and his soldiers and cast them into the sea, and he was blameworthy.
translations.en_yusufali: So We took him and his forces, and threw them into the sea; and his was the blame.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu Kami (adakan jalan) mengambil Firaun bersama-sama tenteranya, kemudian Kami humbankan mereka ke dalam laut, sedang ia berkeadaan tercela.

ayahs.arabic: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wafee AAadin ith arsalna AAalayhimu alrreeha alAAaqeema

translations.en_sahih: And in 'Aad [was a sign], when We sent against them the barren wind.
translations.en_yusufali: And in the 'Ad (people) (was another Sign): Behold, We sent against them the devastating Wind:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga pada (kisah) kaum Aad (terdapat perkara-perkara yang menjadi iktibar), - ketika kami hantarkan kepada mereka angin ribut yang tidak mengandungi sebarang kebaikan; -

ayahs.arabic: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma tatharu min shayin atat AAalayhi illa jaAAalathu kaalrrameemi

translations.en_sahih: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins.
translations.en_yusufali: It left nothing whatever that it came up against, but reduced it to ruin and rottenness.
translations.ms_basmeih: Angin itu tidak meninggalkan sesuatupun yang dirempuhnya, melainkan menjadikannya (hancur) seperti debu.

ayahs.arabic: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Wafee thamooda ith qeela lahum tamattaAAoo hatta heenin

translations.en_sahih: And in Thamud, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time."
translations.en_yusufali: And in the Thamud (was another Sign): Behold, they were told, "Enjoy (your brief day) for a little while!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga pada (kisah) kaum Thamud (terdapat perkara-perkara yang menjadi pelajaran) - ketika dikatakan kepada mereka: "Bersenang-senanglah kamu hingga ke suatu waktu (yang termaklum)!"

ayahs.arabic: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: FaAAataw AAan amri rabbihim faakhathathumu alssaAAiqatu wahum yanthuroona

translations.en_sahih: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on.
translations.en_yusufali: But they insolently defied the Command of their Lord: So the stunning noise (of an earthquake) seized them, even while they were looking on.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka mereka membesarkan diri terhadap perintah Tuhannya, lalu mereka disambar petir (dengan tidak dapat melarikan diri), sedang mereka melihatnya.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fama istataAAoo min qiyamin wama kanoo muntasireena

translations.en_sahih: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves.
translations.en_yusufali: Then they could not even stand (on their feet), nor could they help themselves.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan yang demikian, mereka tidak dapat bangun lagi, dan mereka juga tidak mendapat pertolongan.

ayahs.arabic: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فَـٰسِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waqawma noohin min qablu innahum kanoo qawman fasiqeena

translations.en_sahih: And [We destroyed] the people of Noah before; indeed, they were a people defiantly disobedient.
translations.en_yusufali: So were the People of Noah before them for they wickedly transgressed.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kaum Nuh (Kami juga telah binasakan) sebelum itu; sesungguhnya mereka adalah kaum yang fasik - derhaka.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا بِأَيْي۟دٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waalssamaa banaynaha biaydin wainna lamoosiAAoona

translations.en_sahih: And the heaven We constructed with strength, and indeed, We are [its] expander.
translations.en_yusufali: With power and skill did We construct the Firmament: for it is We Who create the vastness of pace.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan langit itu Kami dirikan dengan kekuasaan Kami (dalam bentuk binaan yang kukuh rapi). Dan sesungguhnya Kami adalah mempunyai kekuasaan yang luas tidak terhingga.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَـٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَـٰهِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waalarda farashnaha faniAAma almahidoona

translations.en_sahih: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer.
translations.en_yusufali: And We have spread out the (spacious) earth: How excellently We do spread out!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bumi pula Kami hamparkan (untuk kemudahan kamu mendiaminya); maka Kamilah sebaik-baik yang menghamparkannya.

ayahs.arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wamin kulli shayin khalaqna zawjayni laAAallakum tathakkaroona

translations.en_sahih: And of all things We created two mates; perhaps you will remember.
translations.en_yusufali: And of every thing We have created pairs: That ye may receive instruction.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tiap-tiap jenis Kami ciptakan berpasangan, supaya kami dan mengingati (kekuasaan kami dan mentauhidkan Kami).

ayahs.arabic: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Fafirroo ila Allahi innee lakum minhu natheerun mubeenun

translations.en_sahih: So flee to Allah. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.
translations.en_yusufali: Hasten ye then (at once) to Allah: I am from Him a Warner to you, clear and open!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Katakanlah wahai Muhammad kepada mereka): "Maka segeralah kamu kembali kepada Allah (dengan bertaubat dan taat), sesungguhnya aku diutuskan Allah kepada kamu, sebagai pemberi amaran yang nyata.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Wala tajAAaloo maAAa Allahi ilahan akhara innee lakum minhu natheerun mubeenun

translations.en_sahih: And do not make [as equal] with Allah another deity. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.
translations.en_yusufali: And make not another an object of worship with Allah: I am from Him a Warner to you, clear and open!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan janganlah kamu adakan tuhan yang lain bersama Allah (dalam kepercayaan kamu), sesungguhnya aku diutus oleh Allah kepada kamu sebagai pemberi amaran yang nyata".

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا۟ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Kathalika ma ata allatheena min qablihim min rasoolin illa qaloo sahirun aw majnoonun

translations.en_sahih: Similarly, there came not to those before them any messenger except that they said, "A magician or a madman."
translations.en_yusufali: Similarly, no messenger came to the Peoples before them, but they said (of him) in like manner, "A sorcerer, or one possessed"!
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikianlah (keadaan tiap-tiap kaum terhadap Rasulnya samalah seperti keadaan kaummu wahai Muhammad) - tidak ada seorang Rasul pun yang datang kepada kaum-kaum yang terdahulu dari mereka, melainkan ada yang berkata: "Dia adalah seorang ahli sihir, atau seorang gila".

ayahs.arabic: أَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Atawasaw bihi bal hum qawmun taghoona

translations.en_sahih: Did they suggest it to them? Rather, they [themselves] are a transgressing people.
translations.en_yusufali: Is this the legacy they have transmitted, one to another? Nay, they are themselves a people transgressing beyond bounds!
translations.ms_basmeih: Adakah mereka semua telah berpesan-pesan (dan mencapai kata sepakat) untuk melemparkan tuduhan itu ? (Sudah tentu mereka tidak dapat berbuat demikian), bahkan mereka semuanya adalah kaum yang melampaui batas (dalam keingkarannya).

ayahs.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Fatawalla AAanhum fama anta bimaloomin

translations.en_sahih: So leave them, [O Muhammad], for you are not to be blamed.
translations.en_yusufali: So turn away from them: not thine is the blame.
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, berpalinglah (wahai Muhammad) daripada mereka (yang menentangmu itu dan janganlah dihiraukan), kerana engkau tidak akan disalahkan (setelah engkau memberi amaran kepada mereka).

ayahs.arabic: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wathakkir fainna alththikra tanfaAAu almumineena

translations.en_sahih: And remind, for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers.
translations.en_yusufali: But teach (thy Message) for teaching benefits the Believers.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tetap tekunlah engkau memberi peringatan, kerana sesungguhnya peringatan itu mendatangkan faedah kepada orang-orang yang beriman.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama khalaqtu aljinna waalinsa illa liyaAAbudooni

translations.en_sahih: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.
translations.en_yusufali: I have only created Jinns and men, that they may serve Me.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (ingatlah) Aku tidak menciptakan jin dan manusia melainkan untuk mereka menyembah dan beribadat kepadaKu.

ayahs.arabic: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma oreedu minhum min rizqin wama oreedu an yutAAimooni

translations.en_sahih: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.
translations.en_yusufali: No Sustenance do I require of them, nor do I require that they should feed Me.
translations.ms_basmeih: Aku tidak sekali-kali menghendaki sebarang rezeki pemberian dari mereka, dan Aku tidak menghendaki supaya mereka memberi makan kepadaKu.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna Allaha huwa alrrazzaqu thoo alquwwati almateenu

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, it is Allah who is the [continual] Provider, the firm possessor of strength.
translations.en_yusufali: For Allah is He Who gives (all) Sustenance,- Lord of Power,- Steadfast (for ever).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Allah Dia lah sahaja Yang Memberi rezeki (kepada sekalian makhlukNya, dan Dia lah sahaja) Yang Mempunyai Kekuasaan yang tidak terhingga, lagi Yang Maha Kuat Kukuh kekuasaanNya.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ذَنُوبًا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَـٰبِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Fainna lillatheena thalamoo thanooban mithla thanoobi ashabihim fala yastaAAjiloona

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a portion [of punishment] like the portion of their predecessors, so let them not impatiently urge Me.
translations.en_yusufali: For the Wrong-doers, their portion is like unto the portion of their fellows (of earlier generations): then let them not ask Me to hasten (that portion)!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah ternyata hakikat yang demikian), maka sesungguhnya bagi orang-orang yang zalim (yang menentang ajaran Nabi Muhammad) itu ada bahagiannya (dari azab seksa) seperti bahagian rakan-rakan mereka (kaum kafir yang telah lalu). Oleh itu, janganlah mereka meminta kepadaKu menyegerakan kedatangannya.

ayahs.arabic: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo min yawmihimu allathee yooAAadoona

translations.en_sahih: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised.
translations.en_yusufali: Woe, then, to the Unbelievers, on account of that Day of theirs which they have been promised!
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka kecelakaan dan kebinasaanlah bagi orang-orang yang kafir pada hari yang telah dijanjikan kepada mereka.
